title: Flame Cobbled
description:
📦 Flame Cobbled
A Cobblemon modpack built for the Flame Network – by Aislx

Multiplayer-first. Lightweight. Fully Cobblemon-focused.

Flame Cobbled is a streamlined, multiplayer-oriented modpack built around the core experience of Cobblemon.
body:
# 📦 Flame Cobbled
*A Cobblemon modpack built for the Flame Network – by Aislx*

> **Multiplayer-first. Lightweight. Cobblemon-focused Server Rendering Modpack.**

**Flame Cobbled** is a streamlined, performance-optimized modpack designed to bring a smooth and immersive **Cobblemon** experience to Minecraft. Whether you're catching Pokémon, battling friends, or building a thriving community, this pack keeps things lightweight while offering enough enhancements to make every moment feel magical.

---

![FLAME NETWORK BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f214227c0844167a8d34d6920e4c552dc6d3c96.gif)

## 🎯 Features

### 🧬 Core Gameplay
- 🐉 **Cobblemon Integration**  
  Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in a vibrant, semi-vanilla Minecraft world.
- 🧭 **Exploration Enhancements**  
  Helpful QoL mods such as minimaps, tooltips, and smoother terrain generation.
- 🌿 **Immersive Environment**  
  Aesthetic and biome improvements without overwhelming the core experience.
- 🎟️ **Players Gyms**
  You can get really good gyms battles and event like Indigo League Here.

### 👥 Multiplayer Ready
- 🌐 **Server-Optimized**  
  Designed with performance in mind—ideal for stable, low-lag multiplayer servers.
- 🏘️ **Community-Focused**  
  Includes land-claiming, shops, and trade systems to support long-term community play.
- 📈 **Balanced Progression**  
  Light RPG systems that enhance the Cobblemon experience while staying intuitive.

### ⚙️ Technical & Performance
- 🖥️ **Lightweight**  
  Minimal mod count for faster startup, low memory usage, and smooth gameplay.
- 🛠️ **Custom Configurations**  
  Preconfigured settings for stability and fair multiplayer balance.
- 🔄 **Cross-Platform Friendly**  
  Works with all major modded launchers supporting `.mrpack` format.

---

## 🌍 Official Server

**Flame Cobbled** powers the official **Flame Network** Cobblemon server.  
Join the server and become part of a growing multiplayer community.

### IP - play.theflames.fun

---

## 🧭 Getting Started

- 📥 Install via [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), Prism Launcher, or any `.mrpack`-compatible launcher.
- 💻 Recommended: Allocate **4–6 GB RAM** for optimal performance.
- 🧵 Based on **Fabric** for Minecraft 1.20+.

---

## 📣 Support & Community

- 💬 Join our [Discord](https://discord.theflames.fun)
- 🐞 Report bugs on [GitHub](https://github.com/aislxflames)
- 🛠️ Have suggestions? We’re always listening!

---

## 📝 Final Notes

> Whether you're a solo trainer or building a bustling town, **Flame Cobbled** gives you the tools, the world, and the freedom to create your own legacy in a Cobblemon-powered adventure.
